interface PatcherType { replace(loc: any, lines: any): any; get(loc?: any): any; tryToReprintComments(newNode: any, oldNode: any, print: any): any; deleteComments(node: any): any; } interface PatcherConstructor { new (lines: any): PatcherType; } declare const Patcher: PatcherConstructor; export { Patcher }; export declare function getReprinter(path: any): ((print: any) => any) | undefined;
